title: Phase 21.5 — GSC Access Recovery + Indexing Request Completion
executive_summary: Phase 21.5 successfully restored GSC URL Inspection access and completed all 7 indexing requests. The root cause was GSC's Angular SPA requiring sidebar navigation to load the inspection component — direct URL navigation redirected to the property page. Fix: Navigate to property page → click sidebar 'URL inspection' link → enter URL → wait → click 'Request indexing'.
overall_status: OFF_TRACK — 424 imp, 0 clicks, 0 backlinks. 7 indexing requests completed.

gsc_access.method: Sidebar navigation (Angular SPA state) — not direct URL
